channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Epstein revelations spur calls to scrape Lutnick's name from college library
item.description: Haverford College students and alumni are calling on the school to remove Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick 's name from its library after revelations...

item.title: From London to Seoul, global leaders face legal trouble after scandals
item.description: Photos: Getty Images and Wikimedia Commons; Chart: Axios Visuals The global political elite reeled on Thursday after authorities arrested former Princ...

item.title: As prices rise, corporate America braces for the blame
item.description: The pricing and affordability debate is heating up, and it's likely to get even more politicized ahead of the 2026 midterms. Why it matters: Rising co...

item.title: Former Prince Andrew was arrested. What the Epstein files revealed about him
item.description: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, formerly Prince Andrew , was released Thursday after being arrested on suspicion of misconduct in public office, authoriti...

item.title: Oil prices jump amid signs of U.S.-Iran conflict
item.description: Data: Financial Modeling Prep ; Chart: Axios Visuals Oil prices jumped to their highest levels since last summer amid growing signs the U.S. is prepar...

item.title: The Epstein files have brought a wave of resignations and investigations
item.description: A number of prominent figures have stepped down or are facing investigations after their communications with Jeffrey Epstein and his former longtime c...

item.title: Virginiaâs Spanberger to deliver Democratic response to State of the Union
item.description: U.S. House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries (D-New York) said Thursday that Virginia Gov. Abigail Spanberger will deliver the Democratic response.

item.title: Replacing Marjorie Taylor Greene puts Trumpâs control of MAGA to the test
item.description: The president is accustomed to defining a race. But some voters in Georgiaâs 14th District do not like being told what to do.

item.title: Veterans sue over Trumpâs planned 250-foot arch, citing cemetery views
item.description: The Vietnam War veterans, who later worked as U.S. diplomats, say that the arch would harm the experience of visiting nearby Arlington National Cemete...

item.title: Trump appears ready to attack Iran as U.S. strike force takes shape
item.description: Although the United States and ally Israel have a military advantage over Iranian forces, there are ways for Tehran to make any attack painful, offici...

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called âamazing and impressiveâ despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with âThe Emperor of All Maladiesâ author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
